title: Woodland Wins Houston Open
excerpt: Gary Woodland claims Houston Open title, Højgaard second
body:
Texas Children's Houston Open Recap

Gary Woodland has taken the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, finishing with a score of -18. Nicolai Højgaard came in second with a score of -17, while Min Woo Lee and Michael Thorbjornsen tied for third with a score of -12.

DP World Tour Update

On the DP World Tour, defending champion Chacarra is currently leading at the DLF G&CC in Gurugram, India, with play suspended overnight. The tournament is set to resume, with Chacarra looking to hold on to his lead.

LIV Golf Latest

In LIV Golf news, the 4Aces GC team, led by Dustin Johnson, took the top spot at the Singapore event, finishing with a score of -27. The Ripper GC team came in second with a score of -25.

Woodland's Score
-18
Højgaard's Score
-17
Lee's Score
-12
LIV Golf Winners
4Aces GC

Other Notable Performances

Other notable performances at the Houston Open include Sam Stevens and Jason Day, who tied for fifth with a score of -11. The tournament saw a number of strong performances, with several players finishing within a few strokes of the leaders.
